hyperedges.label: Offline-First Sync System
Theme-Driven UI Design System
App Shell Layout Pattern
Offline-First Sync Pattern: IDB Queue + Supabase Flush
Wine CRUD with Offline-First IDB + Supabase
AI-Guided Tasting Chat Flow
Zustand Global State Stores (auth, wine, tasting, toast, sync)
Scan Analysis Pipeline (identify -> analyze -> duplicate check -> save)
Sommelier Intent Dispatch (detect -> route to maridaje/enriquecimiento/chat)

Diagnose skill phases form a disciplined debugging loop: feedback loop, reproduce, hypothesise, instrument, fix
Issue tracker options (GitHub, GitLab, Local) are alternative implementations of the same issue tracker concept

n8n AI Backend Pattern
